title: BEZGAR Remote Control Cars - 1:14 Scale RC Car, 2WD 20KM/H All-Terrains Toy Off Road Vehicle Monster Truck Age 8+ with 2 Rechargeable Battery for Boys Kids Adults and Girls, TB142
features: 【ABS CHASSIS AND REINFORCED BODY】The whole chassis of the remote control car is made of ABS plastic and the main body is made of alloy material. All these properties give the truck a better collision resistance to prolong its life span.

【STABLE PERFORMANCE EXPERIENCE】This is a toy grade rc car. The 1/14 scale makes it easier to control, it can go up to 20Km/h at full speed with a brushed built-in motor. Its powerful performance makes this truck an ideal toy for boys and girls up 8 years old.

【USB CHARGE AND 2 RECHARGEABLE BATTERY】The USB charger for the battery is convenient to charge and has several functions such as overcharge protection and short circle protection. And 2 packs original battery allow you to experience a longer gaming time.

【NO DELAY RTR REMOTE CONTROLLER】Easy-to-use non-interference remote controller with 2.4GHz frequency makes the car always ready to run and has non-jamming function. It is a great off-road monster truck for indoor and outdoor.

【PERFECT GIFT FOR KIDS】A cool toy grade remote control monster truck gift, an ideal birthday or any occasion gift. If you are looking for an exciting present, then you will love our radio controlled cars. Everyone can join in the BEZGAR fun.
description: Product Description High strength, scratch-resistant, corrosion resistant characteristics - better protect the body in daily use and enjoy the fun of this truck Absorb Vibration - Protect electronic components, absorb small bumps with ease.stiffen progressively to resist bottoming out over large jumps Thick Design –prevent collision damage, better protect auto parts from collision, without fear of conquering all kinds of terrain
